prompt: A old man sitting alone at a diner counter at 3am, 35mm tight medium shot — rain streaking down the window behind them and backlit by the exterior, soft neon light from outside from one side casting long colored shadows across the character's face and the surface, the rest of the frame in deep shadow, dust particles barely visible in the light shaft, melancholic and still, 16:9. Create this as a simple low-resolution thumbnail-style cinematic still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
